login.title: Expense Tracker
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.rememberTip: When checked, you stay signed in after closing the browser. When unchecked, you are signed out when this browser tab is closed.
login.fillRequired: Please enter your username or email, and your password.
login.failed: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
login.credit: © {{year}} Expense Tracker | Developed by Shaminda Kanchana

register.title: Expense Tracker
register.subtitle: Create your account with a username and password
register.orSignIn: sign in to your existing account
register.usernameTip: Choose a username you will remember — you will need it to sign in after creating your account. No email is required.
register.fillRequired: Please choose a username and password.
register.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
register.passwordMismatch: Your passwords don't match. Type the same password in both boxes.
register.passwordMin: Your password needs at least 6 characters.
register.failed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your username. An administrator will review your request and share a one-time code if approved.
forgot.submittedSubtitle: What happens next is below. You will not get a code until an administrator approves your request.
forgot.successTitle: If this account exists, a reset request was sent to the administrator.
forgot.step1: Wait for the administrator to approve your request.
forgot.step2: They will share a one-time code with you (message, call, etc.).
forgot.step3: Enter that code with a new password on the next screen.
forgot.haveCode: I have my code — set new password
forgot.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.subtitle: Use the one-time code from your administrator after they approve your request.
reset.passwordMin: Your new password needs at least 6 characters.
reset.passwordMismatch: Passwords don't match. Type the same password in both boxes.
reset.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Request a new reset if needed.

addExpense.title: Add New Expense
addExpense.failed: Failed to add expense. Please try again.
addExpense.serverHtml: Server returned an HTML error page. Please check that the backend API is running and REACT_APP_API_URL is configured correctly.

monthly.title: Monthly Report
monthly.noYears: No expense years yet. Add expenses to see reports.
monthly.failedYears: Failed to load expense years. Please try again later.
monthly.noCategoryForMonth: No category data for this month

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Your profile and password
account.usernameHint: Use this username to sign in. Keep it somewhere safe — new accounts do not use email.
account.emailHint: Linked to an older account. You can still sign in with this email or your username.
account.themeHint: Light is the default. Your choice is saved on this device.
account.fillPasswords: Please fill in all password fields.
account.passwordMin: Your new password needs at least 6 characters.
account.passwordMismatch: New passwords don't match. Type the same password in both boxes.
account.passwordSame: Your new password must be different from your current password.
account.passwordFailed: We couldn't update your password. Please try again.
account.profileFailed: We couldn't load your profile. Showing saved details.

authHelp.infoWhatBody: A free personal expense tracking app. Sign in to record spending, see monthly totals, and explore charts on your dashboard.
authHelp.infoDoBody: Add expenses by category, view your monthly report, and review recent activity — all under your own account.
authHelp.infoWhoBody: A personal project by Shaminda Kanchana, hosted with free-tier services so anyone can try it without cost.
authHelp.helpCreateBody: Open Sign up and choose a username (min 3 characters) and password (min 6). No email is required. Then use Sign in with that username and password.
authHelp.helpSignInBody: Enter your username or the email from an older account, plus your password. Existing email-based accounts still work the same way.
authHelp.helpSlowBody: This app runs on free hosting with limited resources. After idle time the server may “sleep.” The first request can take 30–60 seconds while it wakes up. Wait a moment and try again if it fails once — it is usually not a permanent outage.
authHelp.helpSessionBody: Sign-in lasts about one hour. When it expires you will return to this page. Just sign in again to continue.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.Invalid credentials: Incorrect username/email or password. Please check and try again.
errors.Email and password are required: Please enter your username or email, and your password.
errors.All fields are required: Please choose a username and password.
errors.An account with this email already exist: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.This username is already taken: That username is taken. Please choose a different one.
errors.User already exists: That username is taken. Please choose a different one.
errors.Server error during registration: We couldn't create your account right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.Server error during login: We couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.Server error: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a moment.
errors.Registration failed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
errors.Login failed: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
errors.Request failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.Network Error: We can't reach the server right now. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.htmlResponse: Something went wrong connecting to the server. Please try again later.
